name: oyster-os
description: A modern workspace OS with AI at its core

scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:server && node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.cpSync('web/dist','server/dist/public',{recursive:true})"
scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n web,server -c blue,green "cd web && npm run dev" "cd server && npm run dev"
scripts.release: npm version patch && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:beta: npm version prerelease --preid=beta && git push && git push --tags

author: Matthew Slight
